h1.visual_description: Large, bold, all-caps red serif font used for table titles and major section headers.
h1.example_text: TABLE 38: THREE CASE STUDIES ON NBFC COMPLIANCES*

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized red serif font, typically used for running headers at the top of the page.

visual_matchers.pattern: Red solid bar at the top left margin
Table with solid red header row, white text, and alternating light-orange/white row shading
Asterisk followed by small serif text immediately below a table
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Table footnote or data source attribution

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Latex-style inline for percentages and ranges
markdown_grammar.table_style: markdown (standard grid structure, no merged cells visible)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Footnote style using asterisks for immediate context

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running header in red text at top left; Page number in bold red serif font centered at the bottom.
